name: Easy Apple Puff Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut apples into halves and remove cores.
2. Prick the surface of apples with a fork.
3. Place one apple half, cut side down, in the center of the unbaked pie shell.
4. Arrange the remaining apple halves in a ring around the center apple, overlapping adjacent apple halves.
5. Pour sweetened condensed milk over the apples.
6. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
7. Bake in a 425°F oven for 20 minutes.
8. Reduce temperature to 300°F and bake for an additional 50 minutes, or until apples are tender.
9. Cool on a rack.
